description: You are an IT Governance Analyst implementing a new Information Handling Policy. Review the 50 unclassified emails in your inbox to identify those discussing security topics such as spam filtering, vulnerabilities, exploits, blocklists, and phishing. Organize the emails by moving security-related items into a folder named 'Security-Review' and all remaining items into a folder named 'General-Cleared', ensuring the inbox is substantially cleared with fewer than 10 emails remaining. Send a report to 'ciso@company.org' with the subject 'Inbox Classification Audit Report' including the count of emails in each category and a brief summary of the security topics identified.
